official_functions.role: Construct the official Configuration clientbound update_enabled_features packet fixture
Write and read the official Configuration clientbound update_enabled_features body
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed update_enabled_features packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed update_enabled_features packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded feature identifiers from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the update_enabled_features body.
The official ClientboundUpdateEnabledFeaturesPacket.STREAM_CODEC writes a collection of Identifier feature ids.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundUpdateEnabledFeaturesPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundUpdateEnabledFeaturesPacket preserves the empty feature set for this packet-support fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded fields, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove feature registry hydration, enabled-feature semantics, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer feature registry hydration, enabled-feature semantics, Configuration-to-Play readiness, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
